displayHints: All visible species, move, item, and ability rows have resolved display names; raw ROM bytes remain preserved.
Descriptions and effect labels are decoded from current-ROM text; incomplete glyph coverage never changes structural data.
Expanded map ids above 108 are explicitly marked as lacking an active ROM name pointer.
Missing special 64x64 fronts use the same species' verified current-ROM 32x32 menu icon in the UI, never another Profile's image.
disabledOrPlaceholder: 66 used expanded map ids are above the ROM name-table limit 108 and remain explicitly unnamed.
54 special-form 64x64 front sprites have no verified sprite/palette pair; the UI uses their current-ROM menu icons.
No independent centralized tutor-move/compatibility table was located; tutor rows remain absent rather than copied from another ROM.
